home.title: Welcome to MacroFlow
home.subtitle: Automate your tasks with ease and efficiency.
home.create_description: Create or edit your macros to automate repetitive tasks.
home.smart_description: Create automations that read the screen and navigate to a visual target.
home.playlist_description: Organize macro sequences to run together.
home.execute_description: Run your saved macros quickly and safely.

execute.title: Run Macro
execute.description: Choose a saved macro and run it safely.
execute.select_hint: Select a macro from the list to see details.

playlist.title: Macro playlist
playlist.description: Organize macros in sequence and run the playlist by repetition.
playlist.select_hint: Select a macro on the left to add.
playlist.invalid_repeats: Enter a repeat count greater than zero.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your MacroFlow experience.
settings.theme_description: Choose between light and dark theme.
settings.shortcuts_description: Configure the default keys for recording, playback, and closing.

macro.page_subtitle: Create, edit, and record your automations.
macro.name_placeholder: Ex: open system and fill report
macro.no_events_description: Click Record and perform the actions you want to automate.
macro.events_required: The JSON must contain an 'events' list.

smart.title: Smart macro
smart.grid_help: Navigation always starts at row 1, column 1. Enter a row from 1 to 3 and a column greater than or equal to 1; MacroFlow will use the arrow keys to reach the target.
smart.initial_log: Enter the target row and column to generate matrix navigation.
smart.path_preview: Path to row {row}, column {column}: {right} right arrow(s) and {down} down arrow(s).
smart.invalid_numbers: Row, column, and delay must be numeric.
smart.invalid_column: Column must be greater than or equal to 1.

shortcuts.title: Default shortcuts
shortcuts.hint: Use names like F8, F9, F10, Esc, Ctrl, Alt, or simple letters.
